name: Kimika
message: "Haa... I should've seen this coming."

name: Zakuro
message: "...A vase of flowers on my desk."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't know whether to call it a classic... or just say they have no creativity... Don't worry about it, Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Okay..."
They looked at us differently.
The moment we entered the classroom, the atmosphere changed.
Akasaka-san and Kitami-san sat in the back, smirking.
No one would defy them...
Even the guys in the class were afraid of making them mad.
Kitami-san is incredibly strong for a girl... and Akasaka-san is rich, plus her boyfriend is supposed to be a thug.
His name is Shiroyama Tsubasa... He hangs out with three other lowlifes.
It takes pretty high test scores to get into this school, so thugs like them stand out from the rest of the students.
No one thinks well of them, but at the same time no one dares to defy them.
No one wants to get involved with them... That's the surest way to avoid conflict.

name: Satoko
message: "Morning... Tachibana."

name: Kimika
message: "Good morning. You look cheerful this morning, Kitami-san. Just like always."

name: Satoko
message: "What did you say?"

name: Satoko
message: "Are you trying to say I'm some ditz who always has a stupid smile on her face?"
Kitami-san grabbed Kimika by the collar... Kitami-san was tall for a girl, and Kimika was petite, so Kimika had to stand on her tiptoes so she wouldn't get choked by her collar.

name: Satoko
message: "You all heard her. She was trying to pick a fight just now, wasn't she?"

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, she was... You all heard her, right?"
No one answered. No one could possibly answer them.

name: Satoko
message: "This is slander, you know?"
They're not making any sense... She just said hello. Why do they think she was trying to pick a fight?
But Kimika just laughed.

name: Kimika
message: "I just said hello. Are you really going to use that as a pretext?"

name: Satoko
message: "What'd you just say?!"

name: Megu
message: "Hehehehe... Are you misunderstanding something just because we were nice to you for a while? Do you know what happens to people who make Satoko mad?"
Kimika is in the track and field club.
So she should be fairly strong... but in reality she's not at all.
She joined the track and field club because she was so unathletic and wanted to improve.
She might be even weaker than me...
In contrast, Kitami-san is tall, and I heard she's been studying martial arts since she was a child.
Though she doesn't study them anymore.
I heard she used to be in a biker gang and wore crazy outfits before she came to this school.
She's changed since she came to this school, especially since she met Akasaka Megu.
Akasaka Megu cleaned her up and made her look much more feminine.
But she hasn't changed at all inside.
If Kimika got in a fight with her, she wouldn't last a minute...
There are rumors that Kitami-san was famous for fighting dirty back when she was in that biker gang.
She never lost a fight. She was especially cruel to the people she beat because she had never experienced a loss herself.
After she beat someone up so badly that they had lost their will to fight, she would make them strip naked and burn their clothes.
She would carry around a pair of hair clippers so she could cut the hair off girls she beat.
It was common for her to shove baseball bats and cans of pop up other girls' vaginas for amusement.
People say she cut off a girl's nipples with a knife once, too.
Once, Akasaka-san asked her why she did that... and her answer was shocking.

name: Satoko
message: "I'll never lose, so why should I care what it feels like to be the loser? Ahahahaha."
That's how Kitami-san thinks... Akasaka-san felt fear and disgust when she heard that, but at the same time she found it refreshing.
How can she be so confident... Is there anything that she does fear?
But Kimika didn't budge an inch when confronted by Kitami Satoko.
She looked almost at ease.

name: Satoko
message: "Your face doesn't look so good... and class hasn't even started."

name: Kimika
message: "Ugh!"
Kimika's body suddenly flew through the air. It took a few seconds for me to even realize Kitami-san had struck her.
Kimika's body flew through the air and knocked over a few desks.

name: Satoko
message: "Maybe we should have her, you know, accidentally fall down the stairs. Then she can spend the rest of the day in the infirmary."
The stairs?
Is that the lie they're going to tell the teacher?

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika!"
Kitami-san slowly moved toward Kimika, still sprawled on the floor.

name: Satoko
message: "Now then... I'll punch you till you puke."

name: Kimika
message: "Bitch... Why don't you try it out for once, see what it feels like..."

name: Satoko
message: "Agh!"
An unnatural sound. A strange sound I had never heard before.

name: Kimika
message: "A 90,000 volt stun gun... It's really powerful for how small it is. It hurts, doesn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's a stun gun?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right, a stun gun. And...
the product description said this was a stab-proof vest, but getting hit with this on still really hurts."

name: Satoko
message: "Stab-proof?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's stab-proof all right... I bought it just in case you pulled a knife on me."

name: Satoko
message: "Th-That's why it felt weird when I punched you..."

name: Kimika
message: "Probably... Did it hurt? But you were stupid and ignored it out of pride, since you've never lost before. And that's how you ended up in this mess... You let your guard down."

name: Satoko
message: "Tch!"

name: Kimika
message: "Unlike you, I'm weak... I'm desperately trying to protect myself..."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm so desperate...
I might just kill you."

name: Megu
message: "T-Tachibana!"

name: Kimika
message: "Don't move...
I wouldn't want to injure the rich bitch. It would be a pain to deal with, for both of us."
The classroom was silent.
It was hard to believe it was homeroom... No one spoke a word. No one even dared to move...

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "O-Oh crap..."
Kimika quickly hid the stun gun in her bag.
The two of them hurried back to their seats.

name: Senagawa
message: "Good morning, everyone."

name: Senagawa
message: "In homeroom today, we're going to..."

name: Megu
message: "Um, Mrs. Senagawa."

name: Senagawa
message: "Huh? Akasaka-san? What's wrong?"

name: Megu
message: "Someone's brought something dangerous into the school."

name: Senagawa
message: "Something dangerous?"

name: Megu
message: "Yes, it's some kind of electric shocking thing."

name: Senagawa
message: "Haa, who would bring something like that to school..."

name: Megu
message: "No, it's not a toy... It's a real weapon."

name: Senagawa
message: "A weapon?"

name: Senagawa
message: "Huh? What's that sound?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I'm sorry... I dropped my pencil case."

name: Megu
message: "Th-That's some crap! You just broke it, didn't you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? What are you talking about?"

name: Megu
message: "Mrs. Senagawa, she has a stun gun! Shouldn't she be suspended for bringing something like that to school?"

name: Senagawa
message: "A stun gun?"

name: Megu
message: "That's right. Look in that bag!"

name: Senagawa
message: "Tachibana-san... Would you show me what's in your bag, please?"

name: Kimika
message: "Y-Yes..."
The teacher took out the contents of her bag... and found some electronic parts and pieces of broken plastic.

name: Senagawa
message: "Tachibana-san...
what is this?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm sorry... That's my cell phone."

name: Senagawa
message: "Your cell phone?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm sorry for bringing it to school. I know I'm not supposed to have it in class, but it's broken, so..."

name: Senagawa
message: "Why do you have a broken cell phone?"

name: Kimika
message: "There's a soldering iron in the science room, so I was going to use that to fix it. I don't have anything like that at home, so I thought I could use the one at school."

name: Senagawa
message: "But... it's in pieces."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes... That's why I thought it wouldn't be a problem if I brought it to school."

name: Megu
message: "Y-You're lying!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Why would I do that?"

name: Megu
message: "There's no way that's a cell phone! That was a stun gun!"

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... Why's that?
Can you think of any particular reason why I would need to bring a stun gun to school?"

name: Megu
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimika
message: "Why would I need to bring a weapon to school to defend myself?"
L-Like I would know that."

name: Kimika
message: "Then please don't make stuff up... That's ridiculous."

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What?!"
That's a good idea... If she asks them why, there's only one answer.
'Because there's a chance that she'll need to defend herself from violence.'
That fact wasn't convenient for Akasaka-san.
She couldn't answer Kimika's question.
They glared at each other, but neither said anything.

name: Senagawa
message: "Haa... I don't really understand what's going on,
but either way, I'll be confiscating this."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm sorry about this."

name: Senagawa
message: "Anyway, please don't cause any more problems.
Jeez..."
Homeroom continued like normal after that... The moment of unnatural tension was soon painted over with a facade of normalcy.
But it was nothing more than a facade.
Akasaka-san and Kitami-san glared at Kimika all throughout homeroom... Their eyes burned with hate.
Will Kimika be all right?
After that incident, she lost her only weapon.
If the two of them went after her again, Kimika wouldn't have any way of fighting back.
What's she going to do?

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm?
What is it, Zakuro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, will you be okay?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You lost your stun gun... and now that you did that..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that...
Here, take this."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? What's this?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's not quite as powerful as the stun gun I had before, but it's small enough to fit in your pocket."

name: Zakuro
message: "What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's pepper spray... It's pretty strong."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You still have more..."

name: Kimika
message: "Of course. If I'm going to fight against those two, I have to go all out."

name: Zakuro
message: "Fighting..."

name: Kimika
message: "...This is war."

name: Zakuro
message: "War?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. It might just be a game for them, but for the ants underneath the magnifying glass, it's war."

name: Kimika
message: "But I don't want to get you involved, so please don't come near me."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I can't do that. I'll fight too."

name: Kimika
message: "You can't just run headlong into a fight without a plan.
Don't worry. I'm always carrying around weapons to protect myself."

name: Satoko
message: "Hey... Tachibana."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, hello... How are you feeling?"

name: Satoko
message: "What did you say?! Are you mocking me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe...
I'm not mocking you. I came prepared, didn't I?"

name: Kimika
message: "And besides, I noticed you didn't grab me by the collar this time... Are you scared?"

name: Satoko
message: "The hell'd you say?!"

name: Megu
message: "Knock it off, Satoko..."

name: Megu
message: "Really...
let's stop this, Tachibana... This is dangerous."

name: Kimika
message: "Stop it, huh...
Stop what?"

name: Megu
message: "You still have more, don't you? You have to, if you're acting like that."

name: Kimika
message: "I wonder. Maybe?"

name: Megu
message: "We won't come after you anymore, so knock it off, all right?"

name: Kimika
message: "Knock what off? I'm not going to do anything...
so long as you two don't."

name: Megu
message: "Like I said, we won't do anything to you."

name: Kimika
message: "So what are you trying to say?"

name: Megu
message: "You should stop carrying around dangerous stuff like that..."

name: Kimika
message: "I'm not...
carrying anything around..."

name: Megu
message: "Is that really true?"

name: Kimika
message: "Why wouldn't it be?"

name: Satoko
message: "You bitch! Quit acting so full of your―"

name: Kimika
message: "I wish the guard dog would stop barking."

name: Satoko
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Kimika
message: "I don't care if you used to be a gangster or whatever, just knock it off with the barking... Are you a dog or something?"
I could see her face light up with anger.
But...

name: Megu
message: "Satoko, just shut up!"

name: Satoko
message: "M-Megu..."

name: Megu
message: "What are you hiding, Tachibana..."

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows? What am I hiding?"

name: Megu
message: "You're hiding something... You've had your hand in your pocket this whole time. You look like you're about to pull something on us..."

name: Kimika
message: "Whatever do you mean?"

name: Megu
message: "You know what I mean..."

name: Megu
message: "You know damn well what I mean... Stop playing tough."

name: Megu
message: "I don't know what you have in your pocket, but you should know this isn't going to end here."

name: Kimika
message: "I guess so...
It doesn't look like it's going to end here at all, does it?"

name: Megu
message: "Hmm... So you understand.
You know damn well what you're doing."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it's not like I didn't learn anything in all the time you two bullied me... I know very well what you two are capable of."

name: Megu
message: "All right then... We've made ourselves clear. We'll have fun, at least. This is a game for us."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, you go ahead and have fun,
but I'm fighting for my life."

name: Megu
message: "Of course...
since you're just a worm."

name: Kimika
message: "That's right... I'm a worm. But did you know?"

name: Megu
message: "Know what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Do you know what animal has killed the most humans?"

name: Megu
message: "What are you going on about?"

name: Kimika
message: "The mosquito."

name: Megu
message: "The mosquito?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's a carrier for infectious diseases...
It carries everything you could imagine. Malaria, filaria, yellow fever, dengue fever, West Nile virus, Chikungunya fever, and encephalitis too..."

name: Megu
message: "Ha! Are you a mosquito now?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm just a worm...
Though a wasp would be fine too."

name: Megu
message: "Well, whatever you want... Give it your best shot.
I'll be showing you what hell looks like pretty soon."

name: Kimika
message: "Yep, I'll be giving it my best shot all right."

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That was really close... That could've been bad."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Ahahaha,
the truth is... I'm totally defenseless right now."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You are?"

name: Kimika
message: "I gave the pepper spray to you, so I didn't have anything... That was scary."

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was a bluff. My heart is beating so fast."

name: Zakuro
message: "So you were scared... I couldn't tell at all."

name: Kimika
message: "After my main weapon broke, I didn't feel safe with just my backup weapon. I was just about to go get another one."

name: Zakuro
message: "This pepper spray was your backup weapon?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right... Ahahahahaha, I made the same mistake as Kitami. I got overconfident just because I won once."

name: Zakuro
message: "But they fell for it... That's amazing."

name: Kimika
message: "Though bluffing was just my last resort...
Well, I guess it worked out, since they fell for it."
After that, Kimika retrieved several suspicious objects from the track and field club's locker room.
I couldn't even tell they were weapons.

name: Zakuro
message: "There's some kind of liquid in here, isn't there?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah... Make sure you don't break it open."

name: Zakuro
message: "What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "A weapon."

name: Zakuro
message: "How can a liquid like this be a weapon?"

name: Kimika
message: "Don't underestimate it... There are a lot of liquids that are way more dangerous than a blade or a club."

name: Zakuro
message: "This... is a petri dish."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, that's a culture."

name: Zakuro
message: "A culture? Is it a weapon?"

name: Kimika
message: "Of course... A biological weapon can be more powerful than a nuclear missile."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? A nuclear missile? I-Is this really that dangerous?"

name: Kimika
message: "No way... There's no way I could get my hands on anthrax."

name: Kimika
message: "But naturally occurring bacteria are far more effective poisons than any manmade poison. Clostridium botulinum, for instance."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-Is that what this is?"

name: Kimika
message: "No way... The police would arrest me for that in a flash."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then what is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "It smells really bad. There's one that makes people itch, too... I have a few different ones."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, I see."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I have a few to pick from."
We went back to the classroom... The moment we entered, the classroom went silent and everyone stared at us.

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"
Kimika grabbed my hand as I was going back to my seat.

name: Kimika
message: "Let's see..."
For some reason, Kimika put her foot on my chair.

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Eh? Wh-What's this?"

name: Kimika
message: "They loosened the bolts... Or rather, they removed the bolts all together and put wire in instead."

name: Kimika
message: "And I bet..."
Kimika looked inside my desk.

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm... I was right."
It didn't look like there was anything unusual inside my desk, but Kimika stuck her hand in and pulled out several of my textbooks.

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? What's this?"

name: Kimika
message: "Just what it looks like... Your books are ruined. You really shouldn't have left them here in between classes, though."
Thinking back on it, Kimika brought her bag with her when she left the classroom. I thought it was just because she was going to retrieve her weapons, but... she was also protecting her property.

name: Kimika
message: "Akasaka-san."

name: Megu
message: "What is it, Tachibana? Do you have something to say to me?"

name: Kimika
message: "No, not really...
But I was thinking, your family might not be so pleased to hear about this."

name: Megu
message: "What do you mean... Are you trying to pick a fight with me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Not really... But you know, your father is on this school's board of directors, so things might not all go the way you want them to."

name: Megu
message: "Huh? What are you talking about?"

name: Kimika
message: "Nothing... I'm just saying. If this got out to the media, it would be a problem for your parents as well, wouldn't it?"

name: Megu
message: "Wh-What's that?"

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm, it's a picture...
What do you think?"

name: Megu
message: "Huh?"
Kimika passed the camera to Akasaka-san and showed her the picture.

name: Kimika
message: "How about that..."
Akasaka-san's face went pale as she looked at the picture... I wondered what it was...

name: Kimika
message: "You probably shouldn't be doing this. You might be thinking that the people on the board will protect each other, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "But someone famous like your father could lose everything if he got caught up in a scandal like this, you know?"

name: Megu
message: "You bitch... So you're threatening me now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Threatening you?
No way... Why would I do that? I'm just trying to tell you that you're not special."

name: Kimika
message: "If you want to pull something, you'd better think it through. Hehehe... Otherwise, you'll just end up digging your own grave."

name: Teacher
message: "Come on, what are you standing around for? Class is starting."

name: Kimika
message: "Uh, my chair is broken."

name: Teacher
message: "Your chair?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, it's broken... By the way, could you touch my chair as well?"

name: Teacher
message: "Huh? Touch your chair?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes, just touch it with your hand..."

name: Teacher
message: "What do you mean... Whoa, what?!"

name: Teacher
message: "Wh-What's going on?!"

name: Kimika
message: "It's exactly what it looks like."

name: Teacher
message: "A-Are you trying to pull a prank on me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh? Why would you think that? Why on earth would I mess with my own chair if I was trying to pull a prank?"

name: Kimika
message: "If I was trying to pull a prank on a teacher, there are tons of easier ways to do it."

name: Teacher
message: "Th-That's true, but... Then what is this?!"

name: Kimika
message: "I think it's exactly what it looks like."

name: Teacher
message: "What it looks like?"

name: Kimika
message: "Somehow the chair ended up like this, where it would break if anyone sat down on it... Do you understand what I'm trying to say?"

name: Teacher
message: "Um, in other words..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe..."

name: Teacher
message: "R-Really? I guess the chairs must be getting old."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe... If that's what you think, then I guess that must be it."

name: Kimika
message: "So I trust you won't mind if I go retrieve a chair from an empty classroom?"

name: Teacher
message: "Oh, sure. Go ahead... Come back quickly, though."

name: Kimika
message: "All right. Oh, and I know you wouldn't count me as tardy because of this, right?"

name: Teacher
message: "J-Just hurry up and go."

name: Kimika
message: "All right.
Zakuro, I'm going..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, okay..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kimika, how did you know?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, I figured they would probably try to do something to our desks, so I sprinkled calcium carbonate on them earlier."

name: Zakuro
message: "Calcium carbonate?"

name: Kimika
message: "Uh, it's one of the ingredients they use to make chalk...
It's so common in the classroom that no one even noticed... Or at least those idiots didn't."

name: Kimika
message: "And I could see a hand print in the calcium carbonate, so I knew someone had touched our desks."

name: Zakuro
message: "And you did all that just this morning?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it comes in a spray can... It comes out like perfume."

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika, you're really amazing... Why have you always been bullied if you could do this?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was actually because I got bullied that I imagined all the things I could do. I've been researching this stuff for years... I never thought I would actually do it, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then why?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because of you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because I dragged you into this..."

name: Kimika
message: "Humans are funny creatures... When they're suffering, they start to go numb. After a while, they can't tell whether their experiences are terrible, or if they're just going through the same stuff everyone else goes through."

name: Kimika
message: "The first time I understood my situation was when you got dragged into this...
Looking at you was like looking at myself in the mirror, I guess?"

name: Zakuro
message: "S-So that's what it was...

name: Kimika
message: "Who knows... I can't speak for other people, but that's how it is for me. I can't really grasp my own situation. I can't tell if I should be upset about something or if I should just let it go... Not at all."

name: Kimika
message: "And the lines you recited..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Lines?"

name: Kimika
message: "You said they were from a play or something?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Cyrano?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that. You declared war on them when you said that... and there's no way I could leave you to fight alone, you know?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I see..."
So really I dragged her into this...

name: Kimika
message: "If you're thinking that you were the one that dragged me into it, don't."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "I had to fight this battle at some point... You weren't the one who got me into this."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "In a way, I'm even grateful to you, Zakuro.."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, by the way, what was that picture you showed to Akasaka-san?"

name: Kimika
message: "O-Oh, that was, uh... this."
The image was really fuzzy... It was just a picture of a foreigner in the park at night handing something to Akasaka-san.

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What's this?"

name: Kimika
message: "She's giving him money, and he's giving her a key."

name: Zakuro
message: "Why?"

name: Kimika
message: "After that, she went to a specified location and got the drugs she paid for... That's the next picture."

name: Zakuro
message: "A coin locker?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, they divide the drugs up and put a bit in each locker... They can't sell it casually like they used to."

name: Kimika
message: "I spied on her for a few days because I heard she was buying drugs from someone."

name: Zakuro
message: "S-So she really was buying drugs."

name: Kimika
message: "If I wanted, I could just send these pictures to the police, but..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But?"

name: Kimika
message: "If I could get evidence on all of them, that would be perfect... If they weren't all arrested, then, well..."

name: Zakuro
message: "What would happen?"

name: Kimika
message: "They would probably try to kill me... If I send this to the police, that's it, I have no more ace up my sleeve."

name: Kimika
message: "The rumors say that the people dealing drugs in this school are Akasaka's boyfriend Shiroyama, Numada, Nishimura, and Iinuma... as well as Mamiya Takuji."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Mamiya-kun?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. So be careful around him. He hangs out with those guys... Or rather, he's the leader."

name: Zakuro
message: "The leader? Mamiya-kun is their leader?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah. Well, I've only heard rumors, though... I'm not actually sure just how Mamiya Takuji is related to the rest of them. I heard he was being bullied, too..."

name: Zakuro
message: "He's the leader, but he's being bullied? Isn't that the complete opposite?"

name: Kimika
message: "Like I said, he's an enigma... Either way, you shouldn't let your guard down around him."

name: Kimika
message: "He might end up being one of our enemies too."

name: Kimika
message: "This school always covers up any incidents that happen... You saw how the teacher reacted just now, didn't you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The teacher... You mean the physics teacher?"

name: Kimika
message: "He pretended like he didn't understand that we were being bullied... It's probably not convenient for them to admit there's a bullying problem here."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I see..."

name: Kimika
message: "So most teachers probably won't be any use to us. Senagawa knows about everything that's happened up until now..."

name: Zakuro
message: "How would she know?"

name: Kimika
message: "Because I told her directly."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, you actually told Mrs. Senagawa."

name: Kimika
message: "I told her Akasaka and Kitami were bullying me. What do you think she did when she heard that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't know... What happened?"

name: Kimika
message: "'I checked with Akasaka-san and Kitami-san, and they said that nothing of the sort was happening.' That's what she told me... More than anyone else, I really want to kill that woman."

name: Kimika
message: "She asked the perpetrators if they had done anything, and they said no... Is she really that fucking stupid?"

name: Zakuro
message: "S-So that's what happened..."

name: Kimika
message: "And of course nothing happened when I told her it was getting worse... I really started to wonder if I should just kill myself and get it over with."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you didn't."

name: Kimika
message: "It would've been stupid for me to kill myself after seeing you being bullied too."

name: Zakuro
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Looking at it from afar, I had to think... why should the person who's suffering die while they get to go on with their lives like nothing happened? I couldn't stand it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I see..."

name: Kimika
message: "After all, the law will protect us, since we're still young."

name: Kimika
message: "If it's so bad that I would kill myself, I might as well kill them instead... That's the conclusion I came to."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, I never knew you were thinking about anything like that."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, it's not like I've talked to you about it."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you were prepared to go that far... I couldn't do that at all."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, don't worry about it. That's just your personality. You should just keep living your life, oblivious to the rest of us."

name: Zakuro
message: "What do you mean by oblivious?!"

name: Kimika
message: "You're always spacing out... Especially lately."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Kimika
message: "Well, putting that aside,
these pictures are our only trump card... If possible, I'd like to end this whole mess with just these."

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you think we'll be able to?"

name: Kimika
message: "No, it probably won't be that simple... Akasaka has too much pride to just let us go... We'll have to do something else."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? What's wrong?"

name: Kimika
message: "Crap... It was a trap."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Oh, there they are... So that's where you were hiding."

name: Iida
message: "Oh wow, they really are walking around the halls during class."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Nishimura
message: "Oh, if it isn't Takashima Zakuro and Tachibana Kimika... Good, good."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What do you want?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Oh, nothing. We just want to talk to you... How about you two come with us for a while?"

name: Kimika
message: "Don't you think we could talk here?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Oh, that's right..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm... So what do you want with us?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Follow us and you'll find out."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh... Well then..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh?"
Kimika covered my eyes with her hand.
The next moment.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Agh!"

name: Iida
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Nishimura
message: "My eyes, my eyes!"

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Ah, sure..."
Kimika grabbed my hand and took off running.

name: Shiroyama
message: "D-Damn it! Get the hell back here!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What was that?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was a xenon flashlight!"

name: Zakuro
message: "What's that?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, you just need to know it's a really bright kind of flashlight. It won't blind someone permanently, but it'll mess with their vision if they look directly at it. It's perfect for running away."

name: Shiroyama
message: "You bitch!"

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa! They're already starting to recover!"
Kimika pulled my hand and ran.

name: Kimika
message: "Take this!"
Kimika threw something that looked like a test tube at them.
It must have been really thin glass, since it broke instantly when it hit one of them.

name: Shiroyama
message: "The fuck is this shit?! God damn, it smells like shit!"

name: Nishimura
message: "Wh-whoa... What the fuck... Is this nattou?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "N-Nattou?! Fuck, it smells so bad."

name: Iida
message: "It probably is nattou... It's like rotten nattou."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What was that? W-Will they be all right?"

name: Kimika
message: "It'll be fine. They won't die from it."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But they were yelling... Was that poison?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's not poison. It's just Bacillus nattou."

name: Zakuro
message: "Nattou?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, it's just a sticky liquid made from cultured nattou bacteria.
But those bacteria are really amazing. They're super resistant to heat, salinity, and antibiotics!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Kimika
message: "Once they're on your clothes, it's over. Even if you wash your clothes in boiling water for two hours, the bacteria won't die. Even ultraviolet rays can't kill them.
And benzalkonium chloride won't do anything!"
Kimika really does know a lot about this stuff... She keeps saying words I've never heard before.

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Anyway... It's really amazing, isn't it?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, yeah. And I used the bulb from a fluorescent lamp so it would break easily. I even cut notches into the bulb and heated it up so it would break even easier."
Kimika kept explaining as she ran.
That's probably why...

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa... C-Can we take a break, Zakuro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sure..."
She ran out of stamina around the time we passed through the school's front gate.

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, haa... Zakuro, you're a pretty fast runner. Why don't you join the track and field club?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You think so?"
That can't be true. I'm the fourth slowest runner in our class.

name: Kimika
message: "Haa, I'm pooped...
Oh, we forgot to grab your stuff!"

name: Zakuro
message: "It'll be okay... My textbooks are already ruined, and I have a lock on all the stuff in my locker. All that stuff should be okay."

name: Kimika
message: "You know I can open a school locker in a few seconds? That's hardly even a lock."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you're the only one who can do that. There's no way they could manage to do it."

name: Kimika
message: "They could do it in half a second with a crowbar. I hear you can even open safes with a good crowbar."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see... Still, it'll be fine. We can't really go back for it now anyway."

name: Kimika
message: "But what are we going to do tomorrow? It'll pretty much be the same whether we go back now or wait until tomorrow."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, we really shouldn't go back now... Doesn't it smell really bad in the hallway right now?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, I guess so..."

name: Zakuro
message: "If we're wandering around the halls, the teachers might figure out it was us."

name: Kimika
message: "I guess..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Anyway, do you mind if I photocopy your textbooks? Without a textbook, I can't even go to class."

name: Kimika
message: "I don't mind at all, but you really don't need to go get anything out of your locker?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No. I can order more textbooks at school if I need to."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh... All right, gotcha."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun!"

name: Mamiya
message: "...Who are you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You forgot again? Takashima Zakuro. I'm Takashima Zakuro!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Takashima Zakuro... Zakuro..."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, you really don't remember? You lent me one of your books."

name: Mamiya
message: "A book? Now that you mention it...
Oh, right. I remember, or I guess I should say, I understand."

name: Mamiya
message: "Takashima Zakuro... The girl whose clothes I stole and had to give back, huh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?! U-Um..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya... Takuji, was it?"

name: Kimika
message: "What do you mean stole?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm not sure what you mean... What are you asking me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Does that mean you were bullying Zakuro too?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, n-no, that's not it! Uh, Kimika!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehehe... Not that I care, but you really do have a lot of those, don't you?"

name: Kimika
message: "You...
Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You should think a little harder about which hand you're using to hold the bag and which hand you're using to pull something out..."

name: Kimika
message: "Why, you!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun!"
She struck out.
But he easily avoided it.

name: Mamiya
message: "Simultaneously extending the baton and striking with it. That's what I thought... Well, an amateur wouldn't be able to dodge that, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "Tch!"

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika, what are you doing?! Mamiya-kun isn't our enemy!"

name: Kimika
message: "He just said he stole your clothes! He's one of Shiroyama's cronies!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What a pain..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimika
message: "A-Ahh... L-Let go!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun, don't! She didn't mean to do that!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't see how you could accidentally whip out a baton and try to hit someone with it."

name: Kimika
message: "D-Don't touch me in weird places!"

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Weird places?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? You mean the boobs you don't have?"

name: Kimika
message: "I do have boobs! They're just average!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Really? Aren't most girls a bit bigger? In magazines and stuff they're always..."

name: Kimika
message: "Are you fucking stupid?! Those girls are practically made in photoshop! No one actually looks like that!"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, that's a bit of a stretch, Kimika."

name: Mamiya
message: "Whatever you say..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So then, what do you want? Why did you two show up and suddenly start attacking me?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Y-You're misunderstanding. That's not what this is about!"

name: Kimika
message: "It's because you're deceiving Zakuro!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Deceiving?"

name: Kimika
message: "That's right. You're one of Shiroyama's goons, but you keep saying nice things to Zakuro... What are you trying to pull?"

name: Mamiya
message: "By Zakuro, you mean... this girl here, the one with bigger boobs than you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-
What did you just say?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, ah, wha―Mamiya-kun! You can't say that!"

name: Kimika
message: "I'll kill you! I'll put you ten fucking feet under!"

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kimika! That's a knife!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What's wrong with you...
Hey, Takashima, what's going on here?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Uh, this is a misunderstanding! Kimika, stop!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Isn't she your friend?"

name: Kimika
message: "Take this! And this! You! Little!"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's not that I really care, but that is a very nice knife... What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "It's the famous Extreme Ratio BF2 Tactical Tanto! And don't you forget it!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm."

name: Kimika
message: "Ow!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, wow... This is really cool."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Where's my knife?"

name: Mamiya
message: "This is too dangerous for you. I'll be confiscating it."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What?! I saved up my allowance forever to buy that!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really? What a strange woman... Why would you buy a knife?"

name: Kimika
message: "L-Like it matters to you!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Then I won't give it back..."

name: Kimika
message: "Y-You can't do that!"

name: Mamiya
message: "How much was it?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was over 20,000 yen."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, really...
Then I'll be taking it off your hands."

name: Kimika
message: "You can't do that!
And besides."

name: Kimika
message: "Do you really think I'm just gonna let you take it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You really think there's anyone blind enough that they wouldn't see you fishing around for that pepper spray?"

name: Kimika
message: "Behind me?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't know what your problem is, but... I'll let you go for today in exchange for this knife. Go home."

name: Kimika
message: "As if I could go home without my Extreme Ratio!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Haa... Sure, sure.
Hey Takashima, could you say something to her."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Wh-What should I say?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Isn't it dangerous for a girl to be carrying something like this around? Besides, someone's going to get hurt if a violent woman like this has a knife."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, there's a good reason for all this..."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I'm sure everyone has some kind of excuse. That doesn't mean I'm gonna let her go around pulling knives on people."

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course, but..."
Wh-What is it... Today, he's different from normal...
He's not even close to the same amazing person I know... but he's nothing like the Mamiya-kun that's always in his underground room, either...

name: Kimika
message: "So you really are our enemy, Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Enemy?
The hell are you talking about..."

name: Kimika
message: "Look! This is what he's really like, Zakuro! He's the kind of villain who would steal my knife!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, but you did suddenly attack him with..."

name: Kimika
message: "He said I had a flat chest!"

name: Zakuro
message: "H-He didn't quite say that..."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, that would probably be the best way to describe it."

name: Kimika
message: "The hell did you just say?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "There's really no reason for you to even wear a bra if you're that flat... You know? Wouldn't you be fine just using a couple bandaids?"

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Wh-Wh-What?!
That's what you fucking say after groping a maiden's chest?! There's no way I'm letting you go now!"
Mamiya-kun was completely at ease before, but this time he was surprised. Kimika pulled out a pistol.

name: Kimika
message: "Die!"

name: Mamiya
message: "A-Are you stupid? That hurt!"

name: Mamiya
message: "How stupid are you?!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I didn't expect you to pull out an airgun... I thought it was pepper spray again, so I let my guard down."

name: Zakuro
message: "An airgun?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I was wondering why you were backing away from me... I can't believe you had an airgun in there too. I'll be confiscating this as well."

name: Kimika
message: "Aaah!
A-At least let me keep that! Some of the parts in that gun are authentic!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't care... Anyway,
I'll be taking this knife and this airgun as reparations."

name: Mamiya
message: "What? Is there a problem with that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, no... She did attack you with a knife, so we should really be glad that you're not calling the police."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-Besides..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Besides?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Today, you kind of seem different from normal, Mamiya-kun."

name: Mamiya
message: "From normal?
Oh, that's right... I like to lay low at school. That's probably why I seem different."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I guess so..."
But last time I met him outside of school, he wasn't like this...

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, wait... You're talking about the times when I read lots of books?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, yes."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then you don't need to worry... Pretty soon, you won't be able to meet any Mamiya Takuji other than that one."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What do I mean? There's no meaning...
Think of it as a change of personality. I'd like to be a bit more diligent and studious from now on."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, th-that's why you're always reading on the rooftop?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah."

name: Zakuro
message: "But that's weird."

name: Mamiya
message: "Weird? How so?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I wouldn't call a person diligent and studious if they were skipping class."

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess you're right...
Not that it really matters."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, thank you for lending me Cyrano de Bergerac!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Cyrano? Oh, the play."
Oh, he does know...
Maybe he really is the same Mamiya-kun that I met on the rooftop?

name: Mamiya
message: "What, you like stuffy books like that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "Stuffy like a stuffy nose?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, he's talking about sophisticated literature...
Books that are aimed at intellectuals and high society... Stuff like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hey, wait! You were the one that recommended Cyrano to me, Mamiya-kun!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Maybe I did. Did you like it? Then don't mind me."

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But Mamiya-kun, you said you liked it too!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Like I said, that's when I'm at school."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-Then you don't like it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Dunno...
Why do you care about that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Would you change your opinion and say you liked something just because someone else said they liked it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Mamiya
message: "It doesn't matter whether I like it or not."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's true, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "Who cares about that? Give me back my weapons!"

name: Mamiya
message: "No way. I'm holding onto these."

name: Kimika
message: "Why, you..."

name: Zakuro
message: "S-Stop. If you keep going, he's just going to take more of your weapons away."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right. You should listen to her. There's no point in fighting me."

name: Kimika
message: "I-I have to try!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Are you dumb...
I thought you hated people like that."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You're not the type to run headlong into a fight without a plan, are you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You're incredibly weak, even for a woman. Your reflexes are slow, too..."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Thats...
Just how the hell would you know what type of person I am anyway?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "I can tell. It's a simple deduction. If I see a person who's incredibly weak carrying around that many backup weapons, it's obvious that they're the type to plan ahead."

name: Mamiya
message: "A lot of people like that fail to actually act when the time comes, though... but I can see that you're not one of them."

name: Mamiya
message: "Either way, you came and picked a fight with me..."

name: Kimika
message: "You're so cocky. You act like you're some famous swordsman or something..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I wouldn't say that,
but you know what kind of person I am. You said I was one of Shiroyama's cronies, after all."

name: Kimika
message: "You're the one pulling Shiroyama and Numada's strings, aren't you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Who knows... I couldn't tell you that. Anyway,
I'll let you go for today.
If this happens again, I'll be taking more of your toys!"
He laughed and slowly walked off.
Completely unflustered...

name: Kimika
message: "If this happens again, you'll be going home in a wheelchair!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hahahaha... I'm looking forward to it."
Why is his personality so different every time I meet him?
Is he really just acting when he's at school?
Then what on earth could he have been pretending to be when I met him in that underground room?
The more I learn about him, the more mysterious he seems.
